description: Tracks real-time combat variables, status durations, multiple attack penalties, and grid positioning to feed directly into the Grandmaster Combat Loop Core Schema. Values are live from CombatMemory — never hardcoded fixtures.

parserLogicRules.trigger: Agent executes an action with the [Attack] trait
parserLogicRules.logic: Increment attackCount. currentMAP = agile ? (0/-4/-8) : (0/-5/-10) by attackCount.
If two adjacent enemies lie on opposite sides/corners of the agent, isFlanked=true and Off-Guard debuff is synced.
Tick persistent damage; decrement Frightened; reset MAP and isShieldRaised.
